name: Kyle Kinane
bio: Kyle Kinane is an American stand-up comedian and actor from the Chicago area known for a gravel-voiced, storytelling style that mines self-deprecation, drinking, and blue-collar misadventure. His acclaimed debut album Death of the Party led to specials including Whiskey Icarus, I Liked His Old Stuff Better, and Loose in Chicago. He served as the on-air announcer voice for Comedy Central from 2011 to 2018.

timeline.ev: Releases debut album Death of the Party
Named one of Varietys Ten Comics to Watch
Becomes the Comedy Central announcer voice
Releases first DVD special, Whiskey Icarus
Releases special I Liked His Old Stuff Better

accolades: Critically acclaimed debut album Death of the Party

specials.t: I Liked His Old Stuff Better
